hr.notes: Browser dropdown opened and grouped sections were visible; no horizontal overflow.

payroll.notes: Browser dropdown opened after harness reload fix; no API 500s.

manager.notes: Browser dropdown opened and manager-only role surfaces remained filtered.

employee.notes: Browser dropdown opened and admin/payroll governance surfaces remained hidden.

recruiter.actual: Recruiter landed on an allowed notifications route and the top nav showed the recruiter ecosystem, but CDP did not open the grouped dropdown section; no API 500s or console errors were recorded.
recruiter.recommendedFix: Investigate recruiter dropdown hover/click opening behavior separately without weakening RBAC.

superadmin.actual: Superadmin route validation did not complete grouped dropdown inspection in CDP. This remains incomplete browser evidence, not a GO result.
superadmin.recommendedFix: Validate whether superadmin uses a separate admin shell or should expose the same grouped topbar pattern.

visualChangesValidated: Dropdown width reduced to compact enterprise range
Group spacing and item density tightened
Role priority groups implemented in layout dropdown rules
